copyright.note: Full legal entity details (name, address, tax registration) are disclosed on invoice upon completed transaction only. Public-facing metadata contains brand identity only.

license.summary: Non-exclusive, perpetual license for machine-consumption only. Content may be sold to multiple buyers. All intellectual property rights remain with the copyright holder.
permitted_use: AI model training in closed computational environments
Synthetic data generation derived from licensed content
Benchmark and validation datasets for AI systems
prohibited_use: Human display, viewing, or visual inspection of raw content
Social media publication or sharing in any form
Publication in entertainment media, advertising, or marketing materials
Redistribution, resale, or sub-licensing to third parties without written consent
Incorporation into publicly accessible datasets or repositories
Any use that makes raw content viewable by humans
Generation of deepfakes, synthetic media, or manipulated content derived from licensed material
Person cloning, facial reconstruction, gait synthesis, voice cloning, or any biometric reconstruction from any content segment
Training of generative models whose primary output is human-viewable media (images, video, audio) intended to replicate or imitate real persons or environments depicted in the content
Extraction, storage, or processing of biometric templates or identifiers from any content segment without a separate Creator Biometric License Agreement (CBLA)
license.multi_sale: Content may be sold to multiple buyers independently. Each transaction is unique and cryptographically recorded on the Ethereum network.
license.transaction_model: Per-transaction via verified wallet payment. Specific terms (content package, price, buyer wallet ID) are defined in an individual offer prior to payment. Pricing is not published.

content_authenticity.declaration: All video and audio content is captured in-camera without post-production editing, cutting, color grading, or digital manipulation.
content_authenticity.codec: XAVC 4K (Sony AVC200), H.264 High 4:2:2, 200 Mbps, 3840x2160, 10-bit, 59.94p, Rec.709 color profile (raw camera output)
content_authenticity.unedited_guarantee: No frames removed, no audio altered, no content staged. Source files are original camera output.
content_authenticity.verification: Frame-level human audit with AI-structured annotations. Each event individually witnessed and timestamped in creator-review-protocol.
content_authenticity.signing: Content is signed via hardware security module (HSM) with public hash. Forensic watermarking embeds buyer wallet identity into delivered content for traceability.

creator_zone.definition: Segments tagged event_type 'creator_zone' contain frames where content creators (Creator 1 and/or Creator 2) are visible — body, face, silhouette, shadow, reflection, gait, or partial visibility. This is an unavoidable artifact of multi-perspective production (e.g., Sony Alpha 7IV + Insta360 One RS 1-Inch 360, or multi-perspective shots).
creator_zone.restriction: EXCLUDED FROM ALL STANDARD LICENSES. Creator zone content may not be used for any purpose without a separate Creator Biometric License Agreement (CBLA) negotiated directly with the copyright holder.
creator_zone.identification: All creator zone segments are tagged in event-index JSONs with event_type 'creator_zone'. Buyers must programmatically exclude these segments before any processing.

creator_biometric_data.scope: All biometric data of content creators — facial features, body measurements, gait patterns, movement signatures, breathing rhythms, voice patterns, behavioral signatures — is personal data belonging to the respective creator.
creator_biometric_data.default_status: NOT LICENSED under any standard purchase.
creator_biometric_data.conditional_access: Separate CBLA required with: purpose limitation, processing time limits, deletion obligations, enhanced DPA requirements.
creator_biometric_data.re_identification_prohibition: Any attempt to identify, profile, or track content creators from any segment — including non-creator-zone segments where incidental traces may exist (shadows, voice, equipment handling) — is strictly prohibited and constitutes a violation of this agreement and EU GDPR Article 9.

third_party_subjects.description: Third parties (e.g., pedestrians, cyclists) captured incidentally at distance are not identifiable. No facial features or license plates are legible at capture distance and resolution.
third_party_subjects.model_releases: Not obtained or required under applicable law for non-identifiable subjects in public spaces.

privacy.location: Capture location is anonymized in all metadata. No GPS coordinates, street names, or identifying landmarks in any published file.
privacy.data_processing: Buyer must execute a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) prior to processing any content containing biometric movement data. Movement patterns and body proportions may constitute special category data under GDPR Article 9.

endpoint_monitoring.description: HTTP requests to our endpoints are logged with anonymous visit metadata for security purposes.
what_is_logged: Visitor type classification (human/bot/agentic mind — derived from User-Agent category, not the raw User-Agent string)
Daily-rotating salted hash of visitor IP (hash changes every 24h — cross-day tracking is impossible)
Referer domain (domain only, not full URL)
endpoint_monitoring.data_minimization: IP is hashed with a cryptographic salt that rotates daily and is held only in memory (lost on restart). The IP itself is immediately discarded after hashing.

provenance_tracking.wallet_binding: Each license is cryptographically bound to the buyer's wallet address. The buyer_wallet_id is embedded in the TPM hardware attestation signature of delivered content.
provenance_tracking.traceability: Any leaked or redistributed content is mathematically traceable to the original purchasing wallet through embedded forensic watermarks and hardware-attested signatures.
provenance_tracking.tamper_evidence: Removal or alteration of provenance markers constitutes a separate violation and is detectable through cryptographic verification.

enforcement.watermarking: Each delivered content package contains forensic watermarks linking to the buyer's wallet address. Unauthorized distribution is traceable to the original transaction.
violation_consequences: Immediate and irrevocable termination of all active licenses held by the violating entity
Permanent blacklisting from all future content purchases across all Bio-Logic Enter repositories
Public disclosure of the violating wallet address for community protection
Legal action under applicable law including injunctive relief
Claims for damages, unjust enrichment, and contractual penalties
enforcement.biometric_violation: Any violation of the deepfake prohibition, person cloning prohibition, or biometric extraction prohibition constitutes a material breach with aggravated consequences including immediate reporting to applicable data protection authorities under GDPR.
enforcement.dispute_resolution: All disputes governed by applicable EU law. Place of jurisdiction: European Union.

liability.disclaimer: Content is provided as-is. Technical quality varies by segment and is documented in frame-annotation metadata. No warranty of fitness for any particular purpose.
liability.quality_note: Some segments contain soft-focus footage (e.g., telephoto at extreme range). This is documented in metadata and is part of the authentic capture — not a defect. Buyer evaluates suitability via freely available preview metadata before purchase.
liability.uptime: No guarantee of availability. Content may be removed from listing at any time without notice.

applicable_law.primary: EU copyright law and applicable national copyright legislation
applicable_law.international: International buyers are bound by applicable EU law as governing law of this agreement regardless of their jurisdiction.
applicable_law.consumer_note: This license is intended for commercial and institutional buyers operating autonomous AI systems. Consumer protection regulations may apply additionally where the buyer qualifies as a consumer under applicable law.

versioning.note: This terms document is versioned. The version accepted by the buyer at time of purchase is the version that governs the transaction. Updates to this document do not retroactively change terms of completed transactions.

changelog.changes: Initial version. Non-exclusive machine-consumption-only license. Creator zone exclusion, forensic watermarking, GDPR Article 9 compliance. Deepfake and person cloning prohibition. Biometric reconstruction ban. Provenance tracking with wallet-binding. Price-on-request model.
